title: 青空に漂う雲のような

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's been a few days since I arrived at Tracen Academy as a trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Now that I have my own office, I can go through these materials in
pea—

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Whew, sweet paradise! No one ever comes here, and it's quiet to
boot. Not to mention there's a comfy couch here for me to sink right
into!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Now then, without further ado...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Wait a sec! What're you doing here?!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Hey now, this empty office is my precious afternoon snooze
spot—hm?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
That badge you got there... Are you a new trainer? Lemme guess,
they told you this room was all yours?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Okay, okay, I get it now. So that's how it is. Goootcha.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Anyways, I'll be borrowing this couch, mkay? Classes today were real
tough, so I need to catch up on some Z's.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: And with that, I bid you good night.

Without even waiting for a reply, Seiun Sky plops herself onto the
couch and starts snoring.
choice_data_list: (I guess she had a really rough day...)
(I guess she had a really rough day...)

text_block_list.text:
I decide to cover her with one of the office's spare blankets so she
doesn't catch a cold.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Yawn... Another great nap...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Wait, who are you?!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Haha, just a joke. Thanks for the blanket, by the way.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Still... Just wondering, but why didn't you wake me up?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I pretty much confessed that I'd been using this empty room to play
hooky. On top of that, I started snoozing right in front of you.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
This is kinda weird coming from me, but I'm pretty sure a normal
person would've kicked me out ASAP, you know?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
So why did you let me sleep this long, going so far as to cover me
with a blanket?
choice_data_list: I thought you might've been tuckered out...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Hm-hm... I see.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: So that's how it is! Well, thanks for the nap! ♪

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: I'll definitely return the favor... That is, whenever I remember to.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Anyhow, toodle-oo. See you around. ♪
Seiun Sky says her goodbye and promptly leaves the office.
A few days later...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Ah! There you are! Hey you, the new trainer from last time! We've got
trouble—it's an emergency!
choice_data_list: What's gotten you all shaken up?
What's gotten you all shaken up?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: I said we're in a crisis, so forget about the details and answer me this!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Yes or no question: is it correct to assume that lung capacity affects a
racer's stamina?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Say it like you mean it! I'm not looking for a maybe, I need a bold,
confident answer!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Okay, from the top!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: You're getting the spirit! One more time: yes or no?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
So anyways, Teach, this is the person I asked to be my new trainer.
Right?

text_block_list.name: Teacher A
text_block_list.text: I was wondering why you ran off like that, but I see now. Very well.

text_block_list.name: Teacher A
text_block_list.text:
Well then, Trainer, I wish you luck with Sky. Really, good luck training
her. I'll be rooting for you two!

text_block_list.name: Teacher A
text_block_list.text: And Seiun Sky, congratulations on finding yourself a trainer.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Haha, I appreciate it. Then I'll catch you later, Teach.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: And there you have it!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
You and I are now officially joined as trainee and trainer. Cue the
applause! Clap, clap, clap.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Whoa now, easy on the slander. I gave you a yes-or-no question—you said yes.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
More importantly, I knew that you were the one destined to be my
trainer! Won't you accept my feelings?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Huh? You're really gonna make me say it?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: It was love at first sight! Hehe! ☆

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
...For the record, that was a joke. But that whole shebang in your
office last time really left a positive impression on me.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Alsooo, I'm sure this isn't a bad deal for a trainer as green as yourself!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Of course. After all, being my trainer is easy!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
See, I won't ever ask for extra training! No personalized routines! If
it's more work for you, it ends up being more work for me.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Done is better than perfect, right? It's my personal philosophy that
each shortcut taken is extra progress gained long-term.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
What I'm saying is, just sit back and relax. Let's take it easy and work
as hard as we want to. Woo!
...She totally tricked me into this agreement!
Today is my first day of training with Seiun Sky.
Bzzz, bzzz!
Noticing my phone going off, I check my notifications and find...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
"Trainer, I've got big news! There's a whole school of fish by the river
bank! I can't call myself a fisherman if I miss this chance!"

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
"P.S. I'm skipping training today.
Sincerely,
Seiun Sky ☆"
She really ditched our first day of training...
